user_message: Give me the renewal risk for my team. Manager is asking for an update today.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-13 12:04 EST
Subject: Follow-up: renewal risk Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about renewal risk. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Wilson <sarah.wilson@litwareinc.com>
Date: 2024-01-18 08:02 EST
Subject: Re: Re: renewal risk Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about renewal risk. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

Meeting: renewal risk Discussion - Litware Inc
Date: 2024-01-02
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc), David Chen (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on renewal risk from our last session.

[00:06:00] David Chen (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on vendor dependencies and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:08:00] Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc): On the renewal risk front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:10:00] Sarah Wilson (Litware Inc): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:13:00] David Chen (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about resource allocation. Can we address those?

[00:15:00] David Chen (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is resource allocation.
